base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of coin_block_after_hit — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Post-hit deactivated state — yellow/orange brick-tile indicator replaces question-block. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Post-hit deactivated state — yellow/orange brick-tile indicator replaces question-block; persists until level reload
